info.title: TaskFlow API
info.description: Production grade API documentation for the TaskFlow backend.

bearerAuth.name: Authorization
bearerAuth.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format **Bearer <token>**

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns access and refresh tokens.
Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.
Generates a new access token using the HTTP-only refresh token cookie.

get.description: Searches projects by title or description where the authenticated user is either the creator or a team member. Results are limited to 20 and sorted by latest update.
Retrieves a list of all projects where the authenticated user is the creator or a team member.

post.description: Creates a new project workspace. The authenticated user is automatically set as the creator.

description.example: Detailed description of the project goals
Detailed description of the project goals

get.description: Retrieves a single project by its ID, ensuring the user has access.

put.description: Updates details of an existing project. Only the project creator or an authorized team member can update it.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a project and cascades deletion to all associated tasks. Only the creator can delete the project.

post.description: Invites an existing user to the project by their email address.

patch.description: Removes a user from the project team. Only the creator can remove members.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Email of the member to remove

patch.description: Removes the authenticated user from the project team. The creator cannot leave their own project.

get.description: Searches tasks by title or description. Returns a list of tasks that match the query and are accessible to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new task in a specified project.

get.description: Retrieves all tasks assigned to the authenticated user across all projects.
Retrieves all tasks for a specific project. User must have access to the project.
Retrieves a single task by its ID with populated project and assignee details.

put.description: Updates multiple fields of a specific task.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a task. Only authorized users can delete.

patch.description: Updates just the status of a task (e.g., todo -> in-progress).
Assigns a task to a specific user.

get.description: Retrieves the currently authenticated user profile.
Retrieves all pending project invitations for the user.

patch.description: Updates the details of the currently authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieves the latest 50 messages for a specific task. User must be a team member or project creator.

403.description: Not authorized to view this chat

post.description: Sends a new message to a specific task chat.

patch.description: Edits an existing chat message. Users can only edit their own messages.

403.description: Not authorized to edit this message

delete.description: Deletes a chat message. Users can only delete their own messages.

404.description: Message not found or not authorized
